title: Blowin' in the Wind
album: The Joker, Vol. I: Early Years
why_this_song: Blowin' in the Wind by Bob Dylan (1963) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: The answer is blowin' in the wind
Yes, and how many years can a mountain exist
Before it is washed to the sea?
Yes, and how many years can some people exist
The answer is blowin' in the wind
Yes, and how many times must a man look up
Before he can see the sky?
Yes, and how many ears must one man have

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "many" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "many" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "answer" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "answer" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: How many roads must a man walk down
And pretend that he just doesn't see?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Before you call him a man?
Before it is washed to the sea?
The answer is blowin' in the wind

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Blowin' in the Wind" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Blowin' in the Wind" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Blowin' in the Wind" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Blowin' in the Wind", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Blowin' in the Wind" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Blowin' in the Wind" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Blowin' in the Wind" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Blowin' in the Wind" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
